tagline: North America's largest painting franchise offering a scalable, manager-run business in a $49B industry with low overhead and dual residential-commercial revenue streams.
description_short: Manager-model franchise in residential and commercial painting. Franchisees build teams of subcontractor painters while focusing on sales, marketing, and operations management. Low overhead, no inventory, and dual revenue streams create a scalable business with $2.1M average unit volume.
market_intelligence_insight: US painting services industry valued at $49B in 2026, growing at 2.2% CAGR. Aging housing stock drives recurring demand every 3-7 years. Highly fragmented with CertaPro holding under 2% as the largest player.
item_19_headline: Average gross sales of $2,102,015 across 291 franchisees in 2025 with 32% at or above average and median of $1,294,333.
ongoing_support: general manager,regional marketing manager,annual conference,sales conferences,forum group,CertaPro University,commercial services training
